70010000076952.description:
A heroine who has lost everything faces tragedy and discovers her way of life in a magical and suspense-filled Otome game.

[Main Cast]
Olivier Paquet (CV: Okitsu Kazuyuki)
Emmanuel de Beaumont (CV: Umehara Yuuichirou)
Melodie (CV: Suzuki Tatsuhisa)
Ismail (CV: Yamoto Souma)

[Story]
It is an era shrouded in darkness — the world sealed off, and a deadly plague ravaging the land. A peaceful village is ruthlessly attacked by a knightly order, leaving your home in ruins and your family slain.

Saved by a mysterious figure, you are led to a magical city floating upon the sea. There, the stranger proclaims you to be the Moon Witch, destined to guide the people toward prosperity. But amidst your newfound safety and status, turmoil begins to brew. Friends turn on one another, alliances falter, and blades begin to clash.

You wish to end this tragedy. To take root in this land and live on. Who will you trust...? Who will you choose to face the end with?
70010000076952.name: Volontés

70010000087314.description:
Break blocks, grab powerups, solve puzzles, and beat bosses! When a mysterious tower appears in the forest, Chico the Chipmunk and his new friend Beeatrice decide to go exploring. In the tower they'll find a whole host of block-breaking challenges, clever environmental puzzles, and secrets to be unraveled! How can a tower appear out of nowhere? The answers are waiting inside.

In the block breaking Rebound challenges, you'll be tasked with clearing every block from the stage by bouncing around Chico's trusty giant walnut. Keep a long volley going to get a high score! Chico can change the angle of the ball by tail-whipping it while he runs, to give you control over your shot. It's simple to start but takes skill to master!

Of course, it's not always so simple. There are over a dozen types of blocks, and different power-ups for the walnut that change how they interact. Fire power burns grass blocks, spikes smash through blocks with ease, explosive power breaks stone, and much much more! Fans, cannons, ghosts, and more turn each level into a unique challenge! It's block-breaking like you've never experienced it before.

In between block breaking challenges you'll explore the mysterious Celestial Tower, a large interconnected dungeon full of environmental puzzles! Explore all 6 floors of the tower, unlock new paths, and make your way to the very top! You'll meet a cast of characters who need your help, as they try to complete their secret mission. Can you solve the puzzles, uncover the truth of the Celestial Tower, and save the day?

Have fun and show off your unique style! Save up the sunflower seeds you collect, and you can trade them in for special designs for both your walnut and the game's interface! Why not bounce around a watermelon or a paper lantern instead of a walnut? There are a bunch of colors and styles to choose from.
70010000087314.intro: Master skill-based block breaking challenges, solve environmental puzzles, and explore the mysterious tower with Chico the Chipmunk!
70010000087314.name: Chico's Rebound

70010000087511.description:
In Wolf Pack - Howling Spirits, you step into the paws of a young wolf, chosen by the ancient guardian to embark on a profound journey. Your mission is to explore a breathtaking, open-world environment filled with towering forests, shimmering lakes, ancient ruins, and quiet human villages. In this serene yet mysterious landscape, your goal is to locate your slumbering kin—other wolves scattered across the land—and awaken them to form a powerful pack.
But awakening these wolves isn’t as simple as nudging them awake. To awake them from their ancient slumber, you must delve into their dreams, each one a unique world shaped by that wolf’s past experiences and emotions. These dreamscapes offer a variety of gameplay challenges, from navigating perilous platforming sections and solving intricate puzzles to facing intense chase sequences and uncovering hidden spirits. Every dream is a test of your skills and understanding, requiring you to help each wolf confront and overcome the issues that haunt them in their sleep.
As you progress, each awakened wolf joins your pack, bringing new strengths and abilities that allow you to explore deeper into the world. 
Wolf Pack - Howling Spirits offers an immersive experience that blends exploration, action, and emotional storytelling. It’s a game about unity, growth, and the powerful bonds that can form between those who journey together. As you explore this rich world, you’ll uncover ancient secrets, confront challenges, and prepare your pack for an epic destiny, all while experiencing the world through the eyes of a wolf.
70010000087511.intro: Embark on a mystical journey in Wolf Pack – Howling Spirits, where you play as a young wolf destined to awaken ancient guardians.
70010000087511.name: Wolf Pack - Howling Spirits

70010000092323.description:
■New game experience
Playable character "Faintia"
Trigger Heart Faintia appears as a playable character.
Faintia has been redesigned for this game and is equipped with a special laser that allows for sustained attacks.
Enjoy Enhanced with a slightly different attack style from Exelica and Cruelica.
Playable modes
Arcade mode
In addition to Exelica and Cruelica, Faintia's short story and ending will be added.
The score calculation method has been changed from the arcade mode of the previous game, Trigger Heart Exelica.
Enhanced story mode
A mode in which a story using approximately 70 still illustrations unfolds with full voice.
The illustrations have been made high-resolution, allowing you to experience the world of Enhanced, which has become even more beautiful.
Opening movie included

A fully animated opening movie produced by P.A.WORKS has been added, and the theme song is "GRAVITY ERROR" (sung by Ayane)
※Other features
・Training mode
・Vertical screen support (arcade mode only)
70010000092323.intro: "Pull the trigger of your heart once again with new friends!"
70010000092323.name: TriggerHeart EXELICA ENHANCED

70010000097244.description:
Get ready to mosh in Devil Jam, a survivor-like roguelite in the fiery depths of Hell. After signing a cursed contract with the Devil, you're dragged to the underworld and forced to perform the gig of your afterlife. Armed with possessed instruments and a soul full of riffs, fight off endless waves of deranged fans, vicious mobs, and hellish rivals. Every run is a new jam session, with numerous challenges and a unique 12-slot inventory system offering near-infinite build variety. Master the combat, harness the power of metal, and rise to claim your place as the greatest metal icon, by defeating Death himself.

Key Features:
- Deep Inventory Strategy: A unique 12-slot gear system where positioning matters and synergies reign.
- Hand-Drawn Hellscapes: Stylish, animated characters and effects bring the underworld to life.
- Face the Iconic: Take on powerful bosses, including the ultimate metal singer: Death.
- Fast-Paced Runs: Immerse yourself in rapid, intense underworld battles. Test your skills and survival instincts in action-packed showdowns, ensuring you're always on the edge of your seat.
70010000097244.intro: Devil Jam is a top-down survivor roguelite where you play a rockstar wielding up to 12 weapons at a time to fight off hordes of monsters.
70010000097244.name: Devil Jam

70010000097679.description:
Home to magical creatures and plants, the fabled Grimoire Groves should’ve been a haven for witches looking for a new home. But by the time they arrive, the forest spirits have disappeared and only a few plant creatures remain. But not all is lost. With a little hard work, investigation and magic, the witches might just restore the Grimoire Groves to the lush forest it once was!

Master Witch Magic
Unlock and learn new spells to complete your grimoire. Mix and match different spells to find your own brand of magic and master the balance between all four elements. 

Grow, Forage and Craft
Discover all that the groves have to offer! Collect fruits, craft new spells and items and grow plant creatures to repopulate the forest. Honor the witch tradition of foraging and learn to enhance your powers.

Befriend Mythical Creatures
Find the fabled forest spirits and give them a new home. Help them restore the balance of the groves by boosting their magical powers, as well as your own, with decorations around your cottage. 

Unravel the Mystery of the Rainbow Socks
Embark on a journey to recover the most mythical item to ever exist – the fabled Rainbow Socks – as you investigate what disturbed the careful balance of the magical forest.
70010000097679.intro: Join the witches in their quest to restore the Grimoire Groves! Master magic, grow cute plant creatures and discover the mystery of the Rainbow Socks.
70010000097679.name: Grimoire Groves

70010000100668.description:
In this hybrid strategy roguelite deck builder, you must protect your hero from hordes of enemies in a grid-based combat system. Prepare to fend off attacks from all directions as you remain stationary at the centre of the battlefield. Use your action cards wisely, strategically combining energy, cards, effects, and knowledge of your enemies to overcome the odds.

Stand Your Ground
What do you get when an unstoppable force meets an unmovable object? Chaos, and lots of it. With 100+ different cards, items and weapons with unique effect combinations, you’ll craft the ultimate stalwart against the forces of corruption. Build deck synergies and choose key skills upgrades as you set out to save the world. 

Dust Yourself Off
Decide your character’s journey. Trade with merchants, be faced with moral decisions along the way, and shape your hero’s adventure. Unlock unique hero backgrounds that alter your starting deck and can impact the strategy of your run each time you play. 

Brave A New World
The world, divided into eight elemental regions, will permanently react to the multitude of choices you make. Each time you play, experience completely unique runs within an overarching story, with over 100 enemies, 9 bosses, different starting decks and 25 arenas to discover.
70010000100668.intro: Journey to the Void places you at the edge of a corrupted world. It’s up to you to venture toward the centre and uncover the mystery at the heart of it all.
70010000100668.name: Journey to the Void

70010000102920.description:
Make video games history!
Start in a tiny office in 1976, program pixelated dreams on clunky computers, and experience up close how audacious ideas become legendary blockbusters. Form visionary teams, survive flops and risk everything for the next big hit; the future of the industry is in your hands. Are you up to the task?

• Build your studio – from a modest space to a state-of-the-art office complex with server farms and motion-capture studios
• Recruit the best brains in the industry – hire brilliant developers, experienced producers, and talented designers
• Revolutionize the market – design the next-gen console that will change the gaming world forever
• Set new standards – develop groundbreaking titles that will be talked about for decades to come
• Become an industry giant – sell licenses, buy studios and dominate the global gaming market
70010000102920.intro: From a studio in the garage to a gaming empire
70010000102920.name: Mad Games Tycoon 2

70010000103570.description:
This is a deck-building roguelike game. Combine and upgrade over 100 carefully designed spells to forge the ultimate magical power.

More than 50 unique enemies appear across a wide variety of stages. Choose your own battle strategy and cast powerful spells at just the right moment to fend off endless waves of foes!

Encounter unexpected events, decide between risky or safer paths, face different enemies, pick different cards, and discover powerful relics!
70010000103570.intro: Build your deck and unleash the most powerful spells.
70010000103570.name: Legendary Spell

70010000105881.description:
This game lets you train your brain while enjoying adorable bunny illustrations.
Your task is to find the designated bunny hidden in the picture within the time limit.

How to Play:
・Carefully check the image of the bunny you need to find
・Look for that bunny in the scene
・When you find it, tap it before time runs out!

Some bunnies may seem easy to find at first glance…
but the time limit adds an unexpected challenge!

If you ever get stuck, don’t worry—
the hint button will gently guide you by pointing out the general area.

The game supports both button controls and touch controls, allowing you to play in TV mode, handheld mode, or tabletop mode.
※This game is designed to be played on the Nintendo Switch™ in vertical orientation.
70010000105881.intro:
Where’s That Bunny Hiding?
A Cute and Easy Brain-Training Picture Hunt Game
70010000105881.name: Peek a Rabbit!

70010000106778.description:
Primal Planet is a solo developed metroidvania that combines survival and crafting elements with a pixel-perfect aesthetic and an action-packed story, and it's all taking place on a lush planet filled with dinosaurs.

Uncover the Story
Embark on a thrilling journey as you follow the gripping tale of a cave dweller fighting to protect his family. Survive a brutal T-Rex attack and uncover a narrative blending the wild with intriguing sci-fi twists. Forge unexpected alliances as you unravel the truth behind an alien presence.

Adapt and Survive
Survival in the wilderness demands cunning. Use natural resources to craft vital tools, weapons, and mixtures for healing and protection. Gain experience and upgrade your skills to overcome the countless dangers of a primal planet.

Explore the Primeval
Discover diverse biomes, each with unique challenges and secrets. Traverse dense forests, sprawling plains, treacherous mountains, and mysterious ocean depths where danger awaits. Encounter a vast array of dinosaurs, from the majestic Apatosaurus to the terrifying Carnotaurus, each perfectly adapted to its habitat.

Fight and Be Clever
Experience gameplay blending combat and strategy. Adapt to face ancient beasts and aliens alike. Tailor tactics, use crafted weapons, bait, traps, and stealth to master encounters with regular and boss enemies. Every confrontation tests your skill and cunning.

Play Local Co-op
Team up with a friend in local co-op where player 2 can jump in at any time as Sino the nimble sinosauropteryx, your faithful companion. Work together to overcome obstacles, solve puzzles, and battle foes as your bond strengthens, skills increase and Sino grows up to become a fierce and loyal friend.

In Primal Planet, your journey from a humble cave dweller to the planet's last hope is filled with danger, wonder, and the unbreakable bonds of family. Are you ready to rise to the challenge?
70010000106778.intro: Unveil a heartfelt story of family, dinosaurs, and UFOs! Craft, upgrade, and survive in a realm of primeval predators, alone or in co-op. Welcome to the Dinovania!
70010000106778.name: Primal Planet

70010000110284.description: Journey back to Neopia with 26 classic games, brought back to life for new and returning fans!
70010000110284.name: Neopets - Mega Mini Games Collection - The Neopian Arcade Odyssey

70010000111054.description:
Welcome to Kayu, where every citizen, both man and woman, young and old alike, enjoy martial arts.

Living in that kingdom as a Daoist priestess in training, you made your way to the Tournament of Valor to root for your childhood friend.

A sudden attack during the Tournament of Valor forces you to protect your country and those you care about.

Fight alongside friend and foe alike to save your kingdom!
70010000111054.name: Otome Daoshi -Fighting For Love-

70010000111355.description:
In Shardpunk you’ve already lost. The Rat Swarm has breached the walls of The Capitol and flooded the city with its vermin horde. Now you need to run for your life while saving as many people and pieces of equipment as possible. 

Put together a crew of survivors and use a range of steampunk weapons and bots to scavenge for resources, slow down the horde, and reach safety. Push through three districts with progressively more vicious enemies, rising emergency levels, and supplies that dry up like blood from a knife wound. 

Keep on moving and use every skill and item at your disposal to reach the safety of fusion core-operated bunkers. From battle tactics to the most difficult decisions on who should receive the last medpack or rations, you’ll need to take charge and (hopefully) live with its consequences.

FEATURES
- Turn-based tactical battles with the hard choices made at the bunker
- Grid-based levels that are open for exploration and full of tactical possibilities while you run from the endless hordes of rats
- A motley crew of characters to build your team, each one with unique abilities, equipment, perks, and shortcomings that affect their mates
- Steampunk arsenal and technologies to use in battle that also requires mending and cooling, so they don’t backfire on you in the middle of the fight
- Variety of resources to scavenge, upgrades to unlock, and equipment to craft
- Detailed pixel art visuals that set the Victorian mood and feast your eyes with fusion-core explosions
70010000111355.intro: Gather your team, scavenge for resources, fight enemy hordes, and seek shelter to live another day in this mix of turn-based tactical strategy with RPG, survival, and resource management.
70010000111355.name: Shardpunk

70010000111502.description:
The 80s were a simpler and more colorful time. Especially in the arcades! With the Taito Milestones 4 collection, you can transport yourself back to the era of hairspray, neon, and pixels, and experience ten games from a variety of genres. Whether you enjoy sports, martial arts, platformers, shoot 'em ups, or even blocks and balls, you’re guaranteed to find something magical here.

WATER SKI
Released: 1983
Control a water skier being pulled by a motorboat while avoiding obstacles. Jump to dodge small obstacles, and hit a jump ramp to earn points! Just beware of the shark...

FIELD DAY 
Released: 1984
This colorful sports festival includes seven unique games, such as three-legged race and tug-of-war. Up to four players can join, with two players competing in each match. Who will be the ultimate victor?

TYPHOON GAL
Released: 1985
Wear down your opponent’s stamina with punches and kicks, then finish them off with big techniques like the shoulder throw or brain buster! It’s a fight for the ages!

ARKANOID
Released: 1986
The classic block-breaking game! Arkanoid is easy to understand yet hard to master. Use the paddle-like craft Vaus to bounce balls, destroy blocks, and defeat the boss DOH! Elegant, simple and totally addictive!

BONZE ADVENTURE
Released: 1988
Yokai time! Two Buddhist priests must fight snakes, giant eyeballs, ghosts, spiders, and more to exorcise the evil from Enma, the king of the underworld. Too scared to go alone? Ask a friend to play with you!

KURI KINTON
Released: 1988
You are the master martial artist Kinton! Kick and punch your way through hordes of thugs to rescue an intelligence officer of the WSPO (World Shadow Police Organisation) and his daughter. Failure is not an option!

SYVALION
Released: 1988
Pilot the golden dragon-shaped mecha Syvalion to thwart Earth’s invasion by a mysterious army. The storyline changes dramatically with each playthrough, featuring over 100 different ending! 

DON DOKO DON
Released: 1989
Join lumberjacks Bob and Jim as they set out to rescue the kidnapped king and princess of Marry Land. Use their trusty mallets to defeat any enemies standing in their way!

CAMELTRY
Released: 1990
Rotate the screen to guide a ball to the goal! Press the shake button to make the ball jump, and hold it to increase rolling speed. Can you get through the mazes in time for a high score?

THE NINJA KIDS
Released: 1990
When a peaceful town of puppets is overrun by a cult seeking to resurrect a demon, four ninja puppets take up the fight. This unique action fest supports up to four players at the same time!
70010000111502.name: Taito Milestones 4

70010000111807.description:
Welcome to GRIDbeat!

A rhythm-fueled cyber-dungeon crawler where every move must match the music or risk total system shutdown.

You just breached Knoss.OS, the planet’s most fortified corporate network, and made off with a payload of priceless data. Now you’re trapped inside, hunted by rogue security protocols and hostile malware. Your only way out? Sync with the system. Move to the beat. And escape before the grid locks you down for good.

FEATURES

* Beat-Based Dungeon Crawling
In GRIDbeat!, movement, combat, and interaction all happen on the beat. Every level is a tactical challenge where rhythm equals survival.
* Pulse-Pounding Maze Exploration
As you navigate the data labyrinths, keep an eye out for all manner of hazards, including Server Formats that can wipe a level clean.
* Evolving Abilities & Power-Ups
Install powerful software tools to help you overcome system threats, uncover secrets and solve challenges.
* Cyber.Mind Boss Battles
Defeat powerful AI gatekeepers in intense beat-based battles to continue your journey and reach the final exit port out of the Mainframe.
* Step into the Rhythm! 
GRIDbeat’s electrifying soundtrack pulls you into the action, where every move, ability, and attack pulses to the beat. Sync your gameplay with the music and let the soundtrack guide your every step through the grid!
70010000111807.name: GRIDbeat!

70010000111876.description:
Moto Racer Highway Traffic

Start your engine and hit the highway in Moto Racer Highway Traffic, a thrilling motorcycle racing experience where speed, precision, and reflexes are the key to victory.

Ride powerful motorbikes through busy highways packed with traffic. Dodge cars and trucks, perform daring overtakes, and push your bike to extreme speeds as you race through detailed environments. The faster and closer you pass other vehicles, the higher your score will climb.

Take on exciting missions, unlock new bikes, and upgrade your ride to become the ultimate highway racer. Each motorcycle has unique handling and performance, giving you new ways to master the road and improve your skills.

Experience the sensation of high-speed riding with immersive visuals, dynamic day and night environments, and smooth arcade-style controls that keep the action fast and fun. The game challenges players to weave through traffic and complete objectives while maintaining top speed on endless highways.

Whether you're chasing high scores, completing missions, or simply enjoying the thrill of riding through traffic, Moto Racer Highway Traffic delivers nonstop motorcycle racing excitement.

Features

High-speed motorcycle racing through busy highway traffic
Multiple motorbikes to unlock and upgrade
Challenging missions and progression system
Dynamic environments with different times of day
Fast arcade gameplay with smooth controls
Score bonuses for risky overtakes and high speeds

Jump on your bike, test your reflexes, and prove you have what it takes to dominate the highway.
70010000111876.intro:
Hit the highway and race through traffic.
Avoid vehicles and upgrade your motorcycles.
Test your reflexes and become the best highway rider.
70010000111876.name: Moto Racer Highway Traffic

70010000112035.description:
Homicipher, the language-deciphering x exploration adventure game in which you try to escape by deciphering the words of horror men, is coming!

■Synopsis
The protagonist, having wandered into the Otherworld, must learn the words of the horror men who dwell there while searching for a way to escape...

■Nintendo Switch™ Version Features
◎New illustrations added!
Includes several newly-drawn event CG's by Yatsunagi.
◎Fully-Realized System
Optimized with intuitive controls for text input and point-and-click, ensuring a smooth and comfortable gameplay experience.
◎Supported Languages: Japanese, English, Traditional and Simplified Chinese
70010000112035.intro:
Decipher the words of the horror men and aim for escape
Decipher words ・Escape from horror ・ADV
70010000112035.name: Homicipher

70010000112193.description: Étrange von Rosenburg is falsely accused of assassinating the king and is executed. Waking up in hell with no sweets in sight, she decides she'll just have to take the whole place over! Experience this frenetic action RPG from creator Sohei Niikawa, featuring a unique revolving lane mechanic that sends items, buffs, and even characters circling around the map! Enjoy the gorgeous character designs by legendary illustrator Shinichiro Otsuka as Étrange and her allies ride, fight, and even sing their way across hell. The action-packed gameplay can even be enjoyed by up to 4 players in a high-octane multiplayer mode!
70010000112193.name: Etrange Overlord

70010000112514.description:
The Knights of the Cross is an RPG card game adapted from The Knights of the Cross by Nobel Prize-winning author Henryk Sienkiewicz. You will play as the knight Zbyszko and embark on a medieval adventure. Recruit companions, build your deck, and help the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth battle the Teutonic Order in the epic Battle of Grunwald.

【Recruit Allies, Join the Fight】
Recruit over 30 unique companions, each with their own storyline. Completing their storyline unlock exclusive items.
Each character is equipped with dynamic portraits and stunning ultimate abilities and effects, offering a rich visual experience.

【Unique Synergy, Build Your Strategy】
The innovative Teambuilding Combo System: The cards you play will dictate your allies' actions in the turn.
Combine cards and relics with your teammates' abilities to create powerful combat strategies like burn, bleed, poison, and more—offering fresh experiences on each playthrough.
Bosses come with their own special mechanics, such as cleansing their debuffs or limiting card types. Adapt your deck and tactics to break through tough encounters and feel the thrill of victory.

【Engaging Story, Immersive World】
A branching main story with multiple endings, allowing you to change the fate of the original characters.
Over a hundred side quests and random events that immerse you in medieval festivals, folk traditions, and daily life.
70010000112514.intro:
Build Your Deck. Lead Your Allies.
Face the Teutonic Knights. Rewrite the Ending.
70010000112514.name: The Knights of the Cross

70010000112629.description:
Embark on an epic adventure in Aarik And The Ruined Kingdom, a relaxing and family-friendly perspective puzzle game that blends heart warming storytelling with mind-bending challenges. 

Join Aarik as he journeys through enchanted castles, mystical forests, vast deserts, eerie swamps, and frozen tundra, all while solving intricate puzzles to reunite his family. 

Harness the power of your father’s magical crown, equipped with four enchanted gemstones, to reshape the world around you. Fix crumbling bridges, mend broken paths, make new allies, and even reverse time itself! Dive into a world full of unique levels and devious puzzles in this captivating quest to find Aarik’s mother and restore hope to a broken land.
70010000112629.intro: Use the King's magic crown to solve perspective puzzles and fix a broken kingdom.
70010000112629.name: Aarik And The Ruined Kingdom

70010000113069.description:
Trash Goblin is a wholesome and cosy shopkeeping game where you uncover and clean trinkets for sale! Customise them by upcycling and more to meet the eccentric requests of your endless colourful, customers. Spend your savings to upgrade your shop, buy new and better tools, and customise your space! There is no pressure, no risk, no right way to play - it is not a simulator - it's just good vibes and nice customers to serve. 
  
DISCOVER PECULIAR TRINKETS
Unearth knick-knacks of all kinds by chipping away at the dirt and cruft they're embedded inside, wrestling with different types of dirt that yield in different ways. 
  
RESTORE FORGOTTEN CURIOS TO GLORY
Scrub all these strange items up nice and clean with your sponge to get them ready for sale! 
  
UPCYLE INTO IMAGINATIVE NEW FORMS!
Customise these curios by combining Trinkets together, turning them into strange and wonderful new items! 
  
SELL TO A PARADE OF COLOURFUL CUSTOMERS
A wide range of intriguing, odd and charming customers will frequent your store, some with interesting stories to tell, others after a particular object, some just browsing... 
  
UPGRADE YOUR WORKSHOP
Spend your savings to expand your tool set, and unlock more space to work in. Buy a display mat to tempt customers with specific wares, or a soak tub to clean up overnight, an honesty box for getting rid of unwanted trinkets, and more! 
  
TREAT YOURSELF
Customise your space, decorate your shelves however you like, get some nice plants, change up the wallpaper and bedclothes; make it your own!
 
MAXIMUM CHILL, ZERO PRESSURE
There's a gentle limit to how much you can do in a given day but customers will return, you can potter as much as you like, and there are no fail states.
  
FEATURES:
• Hundreds of Trinkets and Accessories with 1000s of combinations and variations to find, clean, upcycle, sell and collect.
• Multiple Tools to buy, upgrade and use across 3 Trinket-care minigames.
• Make life easier with the Coffee Pot, Soak Tub, and other handy gadgets.
• Expand your shop with shelves, storage, and more.
• 4 distinct locations to visit and sell in.
• Customise your shop with cosmetics covering bedclothes, wallpapers, and more.
• 40 unique NPC characters to get to know and sell to.
• 120+ Quests to complete.
• 20+ hours of story content.
• Endless randomised customers. 
• Endless gameplay.
70010000113069.name: Trash Goblin

70010000114708.description:
A small town in the far north goes about its life: preparing for the Festival of the New Star, decorating streets, celebrating. The festival is inseparable from a cycle that repeats month after month. And Sonya stands at its center.

She's part of a story she's still trying to understand. A kind girl with a sharp mind and countless questions, she searches for answers among snow and lights.

Sonya helps friends, makes new ones, explores hidden corners, fights spirits, and solves puzzles. She acts, hoping her actions will lead to understanding.

Game Features:
- An isometric adventure with detailed pixel art that brings a cozy, living world to life
- Combat against spirits and bosses that tests your reflexes and wit
- Puzzles and challenges for those who love to explore
- Memorable characters with their own stories: talk, help, and build friendships
- A soulful soundtrack that warms the heart and stays with you

The cycle continues.
70010000114708.intro: Explore a northern town with Sonya, solving puzzles and fighting spirits.
70010000114708.name: ChildStory

70010000115567.description:
Turn classic Mario side-scrolling gameplay on its head with the addition of Wonder Flowers. These game-changing items trigger spectacular moments you have to see to believe. Witness singing and dancing piranha plants, turn into a Goomba, and more in these unexpected events called Wonder effects.

Set out on an adventure to save the Flower Kingdom from Bowser and take on Bowser Jr. and all seven Koopalings in boss battles through the various worlds. Choose from a cast of characters including Mario, Luigi, Peach, Daisy, and more—this Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition  also features Rosalina and Co-Star Luma. Grab surprising power-ups, like the trunk-trouncing Elephant Fruit and the flower-hopping Super Flower Pot, to help you along the way. You can also enable Assist Mode to become immune to damage, and recover from falls with the Propeller Flower, if you’re having trouble—regardless of which character you are playing as!

Meet up with friends for attractions and entertainment in Bellabel Park

Captain Toad has discovered some mysterious ruins in the Flower Kingdom! Explore this area with your friends in local*, online**, or local wireless* multiplayer in the Nintendo Switch 2 Edition. Visit the attractions to cooperate or compete in over 100 courses that use a variety of game mechanics like Joy-Con™ 2 mouse controls. As you play these attractions, you will unlock greetings to interact with your friends, flowers to decorate Bellabel Park, Dual Badges that enhance your abilities, and more.

Share the wonder with friends and Mario fans near and far

Gather up to four people around one system* to experience the game-bending Wonder effects together as you tackle courses as a team and help each other on your way to the Goal Pole. Online**, you can work together or turn a course into a friendly race to finish first. Even when playing solo, connecting online lets you see live player shadows of up to 11 other Mario fans around the world as they embark on their own journeys. See how they approach each course and get their help when you’re in trouble. Find standees left by other players to help recover from falls—or place your own.

You can also play the Nintendo Switch 2 Edition with friends who don’t have the game, in person or online, via GameShare***.

Already have Super Mario Bros.™ Wonder for Nintendo Switch? Purchase the upgrade pack!

If you already have the game for Nintendo Switch, you can purchase the upgrade pack**** separately to enjoy all the additional content and improvements of the Nintendo Switch 2 Edition!

Unlock and equip more than 40 badges with various effects

Want some more midair time? Equip the Parachute Cap. Want an extra boost underwater? Dolphin Kick is your best bet. Having trouble perfecting your platforming? Safety Bounce will save you from a fall. Using your badges together with power-ups is the key to saving the Flower Kingdom—and in the Nintendo Switch 2 Edition, you can unlock Dual Badges to have two of these effects active at the same time!
70010000115567.intro: Save the Flower Kingdom in the latest side-scrolling Super Mario adventure—now with more content and improvements for the Nintendo Switch™ 2 system
70010000115567.name: Super Mario Bros.™ Wonder – Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition + Meetup in Bellabel Park

70010000116176.description:
Cards Lie is a single-player social deduction experience inspired by timeless games of bluff and betrayal — reimagined in a gothic, Burton-esque world. Each card represents a villager or a demon. Flip, listen, and judge who tells the truth… or who’s leading you straight to hell.

Features

• • 75 beautifully hand made illustrated cards — villagers, demons, and mysterious clues.


• • Procedural scenarios — no two rituals are the same.

• • Lies that evolve — demons adapt their deceit every round.

• • Stylized art direction — gothic charm inspired by Tim Burton and medieval engravings.

• • Atmospheric soundtrack — haunting choirs and dark ambient tones.

• • Easy to learn, hard to master — uncover patterns, analyze logic, and trust your instincts.



Gameplay Loop

1. → Gather your village.

2. → Flip a card and reveal a phrase — truth or lie.

3. → Use logic and intuition to eliminate the demons.

4. → One mistake… and the village falls to darkness.

“Not every smile is innocent.”

Will you see through the lies?
70010000116176.intro: Unmask the demons. Trust no one. You’ve gathered the entire village for a midnight ritual. Among them hide creatures of pure evil — demons disguised as villagers.
70010000116176.name: Cards lie

70010000116595.description:
In Slide Viking: Treasure’s Path, you step into a charming Viking village filled with clever puzzles and personality. Controlling a fearless Viking, your mission is to push axes onto treasure chests, marking each one before claiming the hidden riches.

With 30 levels of increasing difficulty, the game blends logic and strategy across compact boards full of pixel art details. Every move matters, as the Viking moves tile by tile, requiring careful planning to position the axes correctly without getting trapped in dead ends.

Between wooden tables that act as walls and simple yet deep mechanics, Slide Viking delivers the kind of challenge that invites you to think, test, undo, and try again until the perfect solution appears. If you enjoy Viking themes, classic puzzles, and the satisfaction of seeing everything fall into place, this treasure hunt is for you.
70010000116595.name: Slide Viking: Treasure's Path

70010000116676.description:
The Boba Teashop is a cozy horror game where you own and manage a boba tea shop.

Prepare boba teas, serve customers, and expand your menu to attract more patrons.

You play as Risa, a woman who is tired of corporate life and has decided to chase her dream of opening a boba tea shop.

This is a psychological horror game that builds tension through an eerie atmosphere, unsettling events, and moments of intense scare when you least expect them.
70010000116676.name: The Boba Teashop

70010000117609.description:
"99% sweetness × 1% surprise"!?
"Hey, do you know the meaning of the four-leaf clover?"
A fully-voiced, youthful yuri visual novel you'll fall in love with at first sight is coming to Nintendo Switch™!

【Synopsis】
The wheels of fate begin to turn.
The girls meet, fall in love, and deepen their bonds.
"Hey, do you know the meaning of the four-leaf clover?"
Set at "Shonan Saika Academy," a prestigious school in Shonan, Kanagawa Prefecture, this is a youthful story of girls wavering between friendship and love.
Shonan Saika Academy, a high-achieving all-girls school in Kanagawa Prefecture.

One day, Marin Tachibana, along with her best friends Mashiro Saotome and Kiyoka Jinguji, experiences a special day.
It begins with meeting an unusual new transfer student, Shizuku Kujyo.
A beautiful girl with a calm and dignified demeanor.
Meeting her feels like déjà vu...
While showing her around the school, they stop by an observation deck, where Marin finds a four-leaf clover.
There is a tradition at this school:
If you press a four-leaf clover found on the observation deck into your student notebook, your wish will come true.
(I want to get closer to her. To spend more time with her...)
With this wish, Marin gives Shizuku the "coincidental" four-leaf clover she found.
This act becomes a turning point, bringing Marin and Shizuku closer together with the help of Mashiro and Kiyoka. However...
"Please, stop worrying about me. I don't want to just be protected..."
"Shizuku, we're friends, right?"
A storm threatens to tear them apart.
It is deeply tied to a "secret" Shizuku is hiding and a "trauma" from Marin's past.
The story follows the growth, mutual support, and cherished memories of the four girls.
Will Marin and the others find their personal "clover" (happiness)?

【Localization】
In addition to Japanese, supports English and Chinese (Traditional and Simplified)!

【Main Character】
Gentle and healing girl-----Marin Tachibana (立花 茉鈴)
CV: Saho Shirasuna

Cool and beautiful girl-----Shizuku Kujyo (九条 しずく)
CV: Yuki Takada

Bright and cheerful mood-maker-----Mashiro Saotome (早乙女 真白)
CV: Yuki Kuwahara

Caring older-sister type-----Kiyoka Jinguji (神宮寺 清香)
CV: Noriko Shibasaki

【Special】
Dynamic Character Expressions System.
Express characters' emotions in greater variety!
Enhance immersion!

【Theme Song】
"Clover Reset"
Music, Lyrics, Arrangement: Shoichiro Toko
Vocals: Saho Shirasuna (as Marin Tachibana)
70010000117609.intro: A yuri novel game that you'll fall in love with at first sight. this is a youthful story of girls wavering between friendship and love.
70010000117609.name: Clover Reset

70010000118480.description:
Move through 3D space to find hints, solve mysteries and escape from the room.
Anyone can play to the end because you can see hints and answers.
70010000118480.name: Escape game R00M11

70010000119085.description:
Some places don’t stay the same.
In Distorted – The Living Manor, you are sent to investigate an old mansion rumored to be haunted. Your task seems simple: enter the manor once per day, carefully inspect its rooms, and decide whether something supernatural has occurred.
At first, the house appears normal. Quiet. Almost welcoming.
But as days pass, subtle changes begin to appear — shadows where none should be, missing rooms, unsettling figures that vanish when approached.
Each day follows the same ritual:
Explore the manor, observe its details, and trust your memory.
If you encounter something truly unnatural, you must burn a ghost charm in the fireplace before leaving. If not, you return home and come back the next day.
Your choices matter. Burning a charm when nothing happened — or failing to burn one when something did — pushes the investigation toward an uncertain outcome.
As you explore, you’ll discover diary pages scattered throughout the manor, slowly revealing the tragic history of the house and the entity tied to it. The manor itself reacts to your presence, changing layouts, objects, and events across repeated visits.
No two investigations are the same.
The house remembers.
70010000119085.intro: A slow-burn horror game about noticing what shouldn’t exist.
70010000119085.name: Distorted – The Living Manor

70010000119799.description: Famous cola and mint candy mix effect in the fast-paced runner game. Collect as many cola bottles as you can and blow them up with the mints. The more bottles you collect, the longer your jump will be. You don't have to follow the road if you don't want to - just use the jumps to change the lines and overtake your opponents in the race!
70010000119799.intro: Ride the Cola & Mint Rocket for the craziest experience of your life!
70010000119799.name: Cola Riders

70010000119922.description:
Collect pieces of the pajama girls and complete the puzzle!
There are 15 stages in total.
As you clear each stage, the difficulty increases!
Stages 1–10: 30 pieces
Stages 11–15: 50 pieces
The final stage is a tough one with no background watermark!
Take your time and examine each piece to complete the puzzle!
Once completed, high‑resolution images will be added to your gallery ♪
=====================
We support game streamers!
No permission is required to stream this game.
70010000119922.intro: A puzzle game featuring cute girls in pajamas is here!
70010000119922.name: GoodNightGirls

70010000120399.description:
Complete the word by filling in the missing letters!
A beginner-friendly English vocabulary quiz you can play in minutes.

Each question shows a word with blanks. Just choose the correct letters—simple, quick, and satisfying even if you’re new to English.
Replay short sessions anytime and start recognizing spellings naturally as you go.

Great for quick brain training or your first step into English learning.
Build up those “I got it!” moments, one word at a time.
70010000120399.intro: Fill the blanks, learn your first English words.
70010000120399.name: English Basics English Vocabulary Fill-in Quiz

70010000121101.description:
A Slightly Strange Spot-the-Difference is a puzzle game where you look for things that feel “off” in photos!
Sharpen your intuition and observation skills to find the mistakes hidden in each picture.

If you get stuck, hints are available,
so even if you're not confident, you can start playing right away.

Fun for everyone—from adults to kids.
A great game for passing time or training your brain!
70010000121101.intro:
What’s wrong with this photo?
A new kind of spot-the-mistake challenge!
70010000121101.name: Find the Funny Mistake!

70010000121112.description:
Collect pieces of the battle girls and complete the puzzle!
There are 15 stages in total.
As you clear each stage, the difficulty increases!
Stages 1–10: 30 pieces
Stages 11–15: 50 pieces
The final stage is a tough one with no background watermark!
Take your time and examine each piece to complete the puzzle!
Once completed, high‑resolution images will be added to your gallery ♪
=====================
We support game streamers!
No permission is required to stream this game.
70010000121112.intro: A puzzle game featuring cool and cute battle girls is here!
70010000121112.name: Fight Girls

70010000121842.description:
How many Japanese prefectures can you recognize by shape alone?
Hirameki Geo-Training! 47 Prefectures: Silhouette Quiz is a quick, satisfying geography quiz where you identify all 47 prefectures from their silhouettes.

Each question shows only an outline—no names, no hints. Spot coastlines, peninsulas, and distinctive curves, and trust your “aha!” moment.
Play one question at a time for a fast brain warm-up, perfect for short breaks. You’ll naturally build stronger map sense as you go—fun for learners and trivia fans alike.

Note: Map and silhouette depictions are simplified for gameplay purposes and may omit some islands or details. They do not represent precise geography or boundaries, nor do they express any view regarding legal status, sovereignty, or borders.
70010000121842.intro: See Japan at a glance—47 Prefecture Silhouette Quiz!
70010000121842.name: Geo Brain Boost! Japan’s 47 Prefectures Silhouette Quiz

70050000069229.description:
Choose from an even larger cast of characters in this Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition Upgrade Pack*, which now adds Rosalina and Co-Star Luma to the existing cast. You can also enable Assist Mode to make any character immune to damage, not just Yoshis and Nabbit! Assist Mode also provides some protection from falls, giving you a Propeller Flower the first time you slip into a pit, lava, or poison swamp. 

Take on all seven of the Koopalings in newly added boss courses scattered throughout the Flower Kingdom. If you want an extra challenge, visit the Toad Brigade Training Camp and unlock Fierce Fights against buffed-up mighty versions of the Koopalings. Grab the Flower Pot power-up to throw flowers at your enemies and flower jump to flutter up and slowly glide down. You can also unlock Dual Badges that grant the effects of two Badges at once!

Meet up with friends for attractions and entertainment in Bellabel Park

Captain Toad has discovered some mysterious ruins in the Flower Kingdom! Explore this area with your friends in local**, online***, or local wireless** multiplayer in the Nintendo Switch 2 Edition. Visit the attractions to cooperate or compete in over 100 courses that use a variety of game mechanics like Joy-Con™ 2 mouse controls. As you play these attractions, you will unlock greetings to interact with your friends, flowers to decorate Bellabel Park, Dual Badges, and more. 

Share the wonder with more friends—even via GameShare

Team up, or race to the finish, with up to 11 friends online*** or up to seven via newly added local wireless**. You can also play the Nintendo Switch 2 Edition of this game with friends who don’t have it, in person or online, via GameShare****.

Tap amiibo accessories for in-game extras

In the Nintendo Switch 2 Edition, you can now get power-ups in certain courses by tapping amiibo™ accessories*****, including three new ones: Elephant Mario, Poplin & Prince Florian, and Captain Toad & Talking Flower! The game is compatible with any amiibo accessories.
70050000069229.intro: Upgrade the wonder of Mario fun with more content and improvements for the Nintendo Switch™ 2 system
70050000069229.name: Super Mario Bros.™ Wonder – Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition + Meetup in Bellabel Park Upgrade Pack

70050000070347.description: A brand-new Endless Challenge mode! Enemies will swarm in massive numbers, and you’ll need to keep choosing new spells to build the ultimate magical setup. In fast-paced battles, find the spell strategy that keeps you alive!
70050000070347.name: Spell Panic

70070000034530.description:
Base Game:
This is a deck-building roguelike game. Combine and upgrade over 100 carefully designed spells to forge the ultimate magical power.

More than 50 unique enemies appear across a wide variety of stages. Choose your own battle strategy and cast powerful spells at just the right moment to fend off endless waves of foes!

Encounter unexpected events, decide between risky or safer paths, face different enemies, pick different cards, and discover powerful relics!


DLC：
Enemies will swarm in massive numbers, and you’ll need to keep choosing new spells to build the ultimate magical setup. In fast-paced battles, find the spell strategy that keeps you alive!
70070000034530.intro: This edition includes the base game Legendary Spell and a DLC featuring a brand-new game mode: Spell Panic.
70070000034530.name: Legendary Spell(Deluxe Edition)

70010000104078.description:
The Mega Man Star Force series, which expanded into an anime, is back in the Mega Man Star Force Legacy Collection! This collection includes seven games and additional features like a gallery of illustrations and music! Online play is also supported!

The following titles are included in the collection:

Mega Man Star Force Pegasus
Mega Man Star Force Leo
Mega Man Star Force Dragon
Mega Man Star Force 2 Zerker x Ninja
Mega Man Star Force 2 Zerker x Saurian
Mega Man Star Force 3 Black Ace
Mega Man Star Force 3 Red Joker

It is the year 220X, and the world has seen rapid advancements in Wave technology. Our protagonist, 11-year-old Geo Stelar, refuses to go to school as he mourns the disappearance of his astronaut father.
One night, Geo is at the observatory gazing at stars as he usually does. Suddenly, his Transer picks up a signal from space and he is hit with a powerful electric shock!
When he finally comes to, an alien with an electromagnetic wave body called Omega-Xis is standing over him...

Note: The toy link features found in the original versions are not supported.
70010000104078.intro: The Star Force games make a stellar comeback in a new Legacy Collection!
70010000104078.name: Mega Man Star Force Legacy Collection

70010000111730.description: Social and economic conflicts have rocked the world. There is just one metropolis that can boast stability, but even this city only has enough resources to maintain a precarious balance of power. The authorities decided to create an algorithm that could build a perfect city for all segments of the population. This project gave birth to Iris, an artificial intelligence designed for building a utopia. Welcome to Technotopia! Build a perfect city You will have a deck of cards with buildings at your disposal. Build skyscrapers, parks, residential districts and transport highways. It's up to you to decide what the ideal metropolis should look like. Maintain the delicate balance Four factions are fighting for control of the city: capitalists, aristocrats, politicians, and the common people. They will do anything to bend the others to their will, and every decision you make tips the scales. Play the role of arbiter, meeting everyone's needs equally. Meet public needs A city is a living organism, where something is always happening that requires your attention. Where do you put up fire victims? What do you do with the gang that has taken control of some districts? Factions will offer their solutions, but it's up to you whether to follow them or advance your own agenda. Form new connections The city is home to a variety of characters. Hackers, oligarchs, criminals and inventors — communicate with the cream of the crop and provide them with services in exchange for their help in maintaining order. A perfect city is built for people, with the help of people!
70010000111730.intro: Welcome to Technotopia, a city-builder card game.
70010000111730.name: Technotopia

70010000114223.description:
Throw heavy punches, chain quick combos, block high and low, dodge at the right moment, and punish your opponent with powerful counters in intense, easy-to-read matches.

Jump into local couch PvP for fun, competitive showdowns with friends, or step into a story-driven campaign where you build your boxer’s career from fight to fight. Unlock perks that can dramatically change your playstyle, customize your fighter, and compete across a variety of arenas.

With simple-to-learn mechanics, strong visual feedback, and plenty of room for mastery, Casual Sports: Boxing delivers exciting, satisfying fights whether you’re chasing victory solo or battling it out on the couch.

Key Features
- Fast-paced arcade boxing combat focused on timing, stamina management, and smart risk-taking
- Local couch PvP for competitive matches with friends
- Story-driven campaign mode where you build your boxer’s career fight by fight
- Game-changing perks that let you shape your playstyle and approach each match differently
- Multiple playable boxers to unlock, learn, and master
- Fighter customization to create a boxer that feels like your own
- Multiple arenas that bring variety and atmosphere to every fight
70010000114223.intro: Casual Sports: Boxing is a fast-paced arcade boxing game where timing, stamina, and smart risks decide every fight.
70010000114223.name: Casual Sport Series: Boxing

70010000116251.description:
Task Force Ranger – Lead the Way! drops you into modern combat operations against organized terrorist forces in the Middle East.

As part of an elite special operations unit, you hunt down high-value targets, dismantle enemy networks, and strike back in hostile territory. Expect brutal firefights across urban zones, underground facilities, and rugged terrain.

Use a modern arsenal of assault rifles, machine guns, sniper rifles, and pistols to complete your missions and survive overwhelming enemy resistance.

Beyond the campaign, face endless enemies in a horde-based survival mode. Earn money for every wave you survive and upgrade your weapons and gear to stay in the fight.

Lead the way. Eliminate the threat.
70010000116251.intro: Strike back against global terror and lead the fight in modern combat zones.
70010000116251.name: Task Force Ranger - Lead the way!

70010000116964.description:
Take on the role of a futuristic soldier who must protect their city from mysterious alien attack, while at the same time capturing the heart of your sweetheart.

Plan your schedule of daily and nightly activities, manage resources like energy, health, items, money, and time, and build your relationships with each girl. Do battle with aliens!

Unlock 7 different romantic endings with each of 7 beautiful and fully-voiced heroines.


Features
* Visual novel with choices
* Cute anime-style art
* 7 unique women to romance
* Turn-based combat against invading aliens
* Voice cast and original vocal song
70010000116964.intro: Soldier by day, hero by night
70010000116964.name: Just Deserts

70010000119166.description:
Welcome to the world of luxury, chaos, and leaky ceilings. You’ve just bought a rundown hotel with more problems than guests — but with a bit of grit (and a lot of disinfectant), you might just turn it into the hottest destination in town.

Sweep the floors, patch the walls, and hunt down that mysterious smell in room 103. Design every corner your way — from cozy single rooms to extravagant penthouse suites. Stock up your bar, hire competent (or at least conscious) staff, and keep those demanding guests happy.

The more satisfied your visitors, the better your reviews — and the closer you are to earning that five-star reputation. But remember: one clogged toilet can ruin everything.

Dream big, manage smarter, and maybe, just maybe, you’ll turn this disaster into a destination.

Because every great hotel starts with someone willing to clean up the mess.
70010000119166.intro: One mop. One dream. Infinite complaints.
70010000119166.name: Hotel Simulator 2026

70010000120329.description:
Build your financial empire from the ground up! In Build A Bank Tycoon, you’re not just a manager—you’re a financial mastermind. Transform a small startup branch into a powerful, high-security banking empire by mastering the flow of money.

Deposit. Invest. Expand.
Start your journey by purchasing your first Money Printers. Watch as they generate steady streams of income for your bank. From basic teller stations and ATMs to high-tech vault systems and investment desks.

Massive Expansion.
With over 50 unique upgrades and items to unlock, your bank will never stop growing. Expand your lobby, strengthen security, unlock premium services, and even upgrade your upgraders to maximize profits!

Features:

Rebirth System: Reached the top of the financial world? Reset your progress to earn permanent profit multipliers! Every rebirth makes your next banking empire grow faster and stronger.

Auto-Save & Load: Your progress is secure. Build at your own pace—your bank will be waiting exactly where you left it.

Modern Visuals: Watch your small office grow into a towering financial headquarters
70010000120329.name: Build A Bank Tycoon

70010000120447.description:
You’re a blogger investigating a string of disappearances inside a closed public park. What was once an ordinary green space is now silent, empty… and wrong.

Explore dark pathways, abandoned buildings, and shadowed woods as strange sounds echo around you. Footsteps follow. Whispers drift between the trees. The deeper you search for answers, the more your mind begins to turn against you.

Horror Park is a psychological horror experience focused on atmosphere, exploration, and slow-building dread.
70010000120447.name: Horror Park

70010000120651.description:
Stationed in deep underground military bases, the ducks were hungry. Rather than accept their given rations, they dug deeper into the earth in search of delicious snails. Instead they found the monsters of the abyss!

D.U.M.B. Ducks is an action-filled, retro platform game. Slaughter giant snails. Battle gigantic beasts. Buy better guns. Blow up walls. Collect fat stacks of cash.
70010000120651.intro: D.U.M.B. Ducks is an action-filled, retro platform game.
70010000120651.name: D.U.M.B. Ducks

70050000064762.description:
This product includes content for the Home screen of the game. Geo Stelar (casual outfit) and Omega-Xis will be added as selectable characters.

Note: Additional character models cannot be used in gameplay.

Special arrangements for four music tracks are also included for the Music Player.

Loneliness – Summer Shade Version
Astro Wave – Brilliant Expanse Version
Anthem of the Solitary – Howling Void Version
Cheerful Indoors – School Days Version
70050000064762.name: Mega Man Star Force Legacy Collection – Geo Stelar and Omega-Xis Character Model Pack

70070000034593.description:
Enjoy this party game bundle packed with dozens of sports game and unexpected activities to play solo or with friends and family.

This bundle includes:
- Sports Camp: A 35-Game Adventure
- Instant Sports
- Instant Sports Winter Games
- Instant Sports Summer Games
70070000034593.intro: Access 50 party games and compete with your friends and family in local co-op.
70070000034593.name: Sports Challenge: 50+ Games Edition

70070000034637.description:
Urban Flow is a game about the subtle beauty of city streets filled with cars moving in perfect harmony. But such order does not happen all by itself - the city needs YOU to control the traffic lights and to make sure everything goes smoothly. That means no crashes, no jams. Everything will run perfectly - as long as you stay focused!

Immerse yourself in a beautiful, hand-crafted, low-poly world to discover the enormous satisfaction of watching the hundreds of tiny, colorful cars flowing through the streets – all while listening to the chill, urban music.

Over 100 levels, each with its own busy intersection. You have one job: operate the lights and keep it safe.

Party Game (even if you party all alone!)
-----
 Play by yourself or with friends in scalable drop-in, drop-out local co-op mode for two, three, or four players!
You can help your friends or be a little rascal and spread the chaos!

Avoid accidents by paying close attention to special vehicles and to the other players. Special vehicles include the ambulance, which can’t wait for long, and the tank – which will plow through anything in its way.

Don’t want to play the campaign?
-----
 Try our score-based Endless Mode or the Chill Mode - where you play for as long as you want, no rush and no score - only you and the music. Urban Flow is designed to be a great single player experience!

Discover various environments and weather conditions. Play with touch controls, Pro Controllers or Joy-Con™. Complete challenges and unlock rewards.

Become one with the flow. The Urban Flow!

This bundle includes base game, Expansion Pack, London Rules and Streets Supplement#3 with:

•    New challenge mode offers medals - no more star system in challenge mode! You have to pass the challenge bar to pass the challenge mode stages.
•    30 new stages!
•    5 new vehicles
70070000034637.intro: Manage the city lights and try to avoid the chaos!
70070000034637.name: Urban Flow Comprehensive Edition

70070000034646.description:
Your adventure begins with Food Truck Tycoon. Cook, chop, bake and enjoy hundreds of unique dishes.

But the journey of a thousand dishes is just the beginning!

As you hone your cooking skills and build your reputation with food trucks, you'll be given the opportunity to explore more gourmet games as DLC.

Customize your kitchen with countless upgrades and serve delicious food in different locations. Keep the grill hot, keep your customers smiling, sauté, mix and serve to the top.

Face cooking challenges to become the ultimate chef in town!

So put on your apron, sharpen your knives and enter the cooking arena. Life is a party - let's cook delicious!

This bundle contains "Cooking Arena", "Food Truck Tycoon Asian Cuisine" and "Pancake Bar Tycoon".
70070000034646.intro: Universe bursting with flavors and culinary adventures awaits!
70070000034646.name: Cooking Arena Super Edition

70070000034648.description:
Inspired by the classics, developed for the modern audiences.

A classic revenge story set in a medieval fantasy world… with a touch of deadly modern firepower just to turn things up to eleven. Fight through the armies of undead, mutants, aliens, machines and beasts in order to get back what is rightfully yours and bring some semblance of peace back to the land. Who knows - if you’re thorough enough you might even discover the history of the kingdom itself, long lost to the scholars of the realm.

Knights & Guns brings you to a dangerous world where you will fight, alongside your friend, against demons, ghouls & ghosts. Use shotguns, lasers and the power of chivalry to overcome every obstacle. Become the best version of a knight - one with a gun.

Inside the game:
•	Fight awesome bosses on various stages! 
•	Conquer the non-linear world! Rush through over 150 hand crafted stages, or enjoy the game at your own pace, looking for secrets and special routes!
•	Entire game designed for both single player or co-op multiplayer. Invite a friend at any time for some extra firepower and mayhem.
•	60 fps gameplay! Try the different modes! Hunt the monsters! Survive! Play on small, big and narrow maps!
•	Check out all the awesome suits of armor and, of course, all the GUNS! Lasers, shotguns, grenade launchers, sniper rifles... They are all here!
•	Over 30 unique guns. (That’s probably more flavors of death than flavors of ice cream you can name.)
•	Over 25 types of enemies, 5 types of mini-bosses and 3 types of bosses. Most of these come in different colors, too.
•	30 unique suits of armor for the knights. Extra protection and extra style!
•	Traps, chests, keys, scrolls of lore, books of monsters...

This bundle includes base game, Armor Pack #3 and Armor Pack #4 with:
- 4 new armors to help you on your quest
70070000034648.intro: Knight in shining armor, fight your way... with Guns!
70070000034648.name: Knights & Guns Core Edition

70010000116328.description:
Get ready to bake your heart out! Combine fluffy buns, watch them grow into mouth-watering pastries, and push your skills to the limit in this physics-based puzzle challenge.

Use clever power-ups to escape sticky situations and keep burnt dough under control. Timing and placement are everything! One wrong move, and your perfect bake could crumble!

Travel through charming bakeries, each bringing new twists and challenges to master. How big can your ultimate bun get?

Features:
- Online leaderboards to show off your skills!
- Co-op mode to bake together with friends!
- 2 maps with unique basket shapes
- Handy power-ups to save your run!
- Fully customizable baker with cute outfits
- A warm and cozy aesthetic

Bake yourself a fresh high score!
70010000116328.intro: Don’t let your buns hop out the basket! Drop, merge, and stack your pastries to bake the biggest, most delicious treat!
70010000116328.name: Bun Buns

70050000070954.description:
With this DLC, you'll unlock:
- A cute and cozy forest map
- 9 natural hairstyles
- 2 fantasy outfits
- 2 grassy hats
- 2 leafy accessories

Bake yourself a fresh new look!
70050000070954.intro: Create the coziest bakery in town!
70050000070954.name: Bun Buns: Cozy DLC

70050000070956.description:
With this DLC, you'll unlock:
- A cute and cozy dream map
- 9 pastel hairstyles
- 2 colorful outfits
- 2 cute hats
- 2 dreamy accessories

Bake yourself a fresh new look!
70050000070956.intro: Become the cutest baker in town!
70050000070956.name: Bun Buns: Cute DLC

70070000034940.description:
Take control of a mighty dinosaur in a post-apocalyptic world on a quest to recover its stolen eggs.

Smash through environments, gather resources, and hunt grotesque human-mutants to evolve and grow stronger. Use what you collect to rebuild bridges, restore paths and push deeper into a world filled with danger and mystery. 

Explore vast landscapes, uncover hidden secrets and face terrifying bosses standing between you and your lost brood.

Features:
- Unleash powerful evolution form with Celestosaurus skin
- Break everything: destroy environments and leave nothing standing
- Use advanced technology: encounter futuristic machines that will aid your survival
- Engage in fierce battles: hunt down mutants and monstrous creatures
- Meet various enemies: take on diverse foes with unique behaviors
- Lead your warriors: command other beasts and dominate the wasteland
- Evolve to become a super beast: grow stronger with every challenge you overcome!
- Use 400 Meat, 15 Mutagen and 500 Gems to power up your evolution and make your raptor stronger in every battle

Will you survive and recover your eggs?
70070000034940.name: Raptor Evolution: Godly Edition

70070000034958.description:
Your friends are scattered across the city, and the rail network is in pieces! Draw colored tracks, reconnect the railroads, and guide trains back to their stations to find your lost buddies and bring everyone home.

With each rescue, your hometown slowly recovers, but the puzzles get trickier. Tunnels, crossroads, and clever obstacles will test your logic and creativity as you invent new routes, solve mind-bending challenges, and restore order to the railways.

Features:
- 1000+ handcrafted logic puzzles!
- 120 extra-large levels full of challenges!
- Tricky mechanics like gates, crossroads, and obstacles.
- Multiple solutions that reward creative thinking!
- Optional hints to help you through tougher levels.
- A beautiful city full of life waiting to be restored!

Choo Choo! Next station is never-ending fun!
70070000034958.intro: Your train crashed! Find your friends and rebuild your home!
70070000034958.name: Rail Rescue: Puzzle Lines - Complete Edition

70010000105075.description:
About Homura: The Crimson Warriors
Fourteen years have passed since the Battle of Sekigahara split Japan in two.

Now firmly in control, the Tokugawa shogunate is scheming to eliminate the Toyotomi clan, a long-standing thorn in its side.

In response, the Toyotomi clan has decided to confront the Tokugawa head-on, using Osaka Castle as their stronghold. Calls for support were sent to daimyo throughout the nation and a mere few answered the call. One of these brave warriors was Nobushige Sanada, the second son of the Sanada family who was cast away to Mt. Kudo on house arrest after the Battle of Sekigahara.

Alongside Nobushige on his escape from Mt. Kudo are the Sanada Ten Braves, ten ninjas who serve him even after their exile. Standing in their way are the Ura Yagyu, a group comprised of assassins who have carried out many killings under orders from the shogunate, mysterious swordsmen, and mighty warriors.

This is the final chapter of the Warring States period. It is a tale of the bonds and way of life shared by the Nobushige Sanada and the Ten Braves who gather at Osaka Castle.

Key Features
Amongst the fire and ashes, love will prevail — Previously released in Japan on PS Vita in 2018, Western fans can experience the historical fantasy otome as the protagonist Mutsumi Mochizuki fights alongside the Crimson Warriors. Accompanied with multiple endings and CGs, this legendary battle of love tangled with iconic historical events and original characters in the Warring States period is sure to capture the hearts of history otome lovers!

Maintain peak performance with Energy Reading — Use Energy Reading to detect the affection level and Ring status of love interests. Mutsumi has the special ability to adjust the love interests' Rings. When sped up, it allows them to utilize unique powers at the cost of their physical health. Make sure to keep their Rings balanced! If their health deteriorates too much, the consequences could be dire…

Ninja Guidance — Use your ninja scrolls to keep track of where you are in the story and revisit moments of the past if you seek a different outcome of the path you've chosen. Adjust both your affection and ring levels with each warrior when you select previously viewed events to change the course of history!

Path of the Samurai — Throughout the story, you can level up your ninja rank to keep up with the Crimson Warriors during battle. Take your ninja skills to the next level and make it your mission to reach Master rank and ensure victory against the Ura Yagyu!
70010000105075.intro: Ignite the fire within the Crimson Warriors' hearts in their final showdown!
70010000105075.name: Homura: The Crimson Warriors

70010000105076.description: The Digital Short Stories include five stories—one for each love interest. In 20 pages, find out what happens outside of the battlefield and how fiery things can get!
70010000105076.intro: Ignite the fire within the Crimson Warriors' hearts in their
70010000105076.name: Homura: The Crimson Warriors Digital Short Stories

70010000105077.description:
Sometimes, you need a break from the battlefield (and romance). Grab the Digital Soundtrack to help soothe your soul and tug at your heartstrings!

Tracklist (26 Tracks):
Composition: Yuki Sugiura (STUDIO EDEN INC.)

1. Turmoil
2. Daylight
3. Sunlight Dancing Through Trees
4. Secret Meeting
5. Twilight
6. Flirtation
7. Heartstrings
8. Longing
9. Feast
10. Loneliness
11. Sorrow
12. Darkness
13. Alarm
14. Battle
15. Heartbeat
16. Rising Courage
17. Defensive Stance
18. Despair
19. Awakening
20. A Dream Within a Dream
21. Eternity
22. Intertwined Fates
23. Parting
24. Soul
25. Full Moon
26. True Love
70010000105077.intro: Ignite the fire within the Crimson Warriors' hearts in their final showdown!
70010000105077.name: Homura: The Crimson Warriors Digital Soundtrack

70050000065184.description:
Prince Azure, Monsieur Brunette, Mrs White, Madame Rose, Miss Peach and Inspector Gray join the modern Clue digital game!

Redesigned and updated for the modern era, this pack contains twelve new suspect tokens that can be used on any crime scene you own.

Whether you’ve been waiting eagerly for their return or you’re meeting them for the first time,  when you add the Legacy Suspect Pack to your game, you can play the most iconic, nostalgic version of Clue!  

INCLUDES:
- 2 x PRINCE AZURE TOKENS – Give the prince a royal welcome to the modern Clue digital game!
- 2 x MONSIEUR BRUNETTE TOKENS – The roguish con artist swindles his way back onto the board.
- 2 x MRS WHITE TOKENS – The original Mrs White makes her grand return to the game.
- 2 x MADAME ROSE TOKENS – Madame Rose always knew she’d come back to Clue someday…
- 2 x MISS PEACH TOKENS – The Southern belle graces the board with her presence once more! 
- 2 x INSPECTOR GRAY TOKENS – This corrupt cop finds the Clue board again!
70050000065184.intro: More fan-favourite legacy suspects return to Clue!
70050000065184.name: Clue: Legacy Suspect Pack

70070000033943.description:
Brave the Ura Yagyu and win the hearts of the Crimson Warriors with the Deluxe Edition! This bundle includes the digital game, five short stories featuring fiery romance for each of the five love interests, and a 26-track digital soundtrack!

The Deluxe Edition includes:
・Digital Standard Edition
・Digital Short Stories (20 Pages)
・Digital Soundtrack (26 Tracks)
70070000033943.intro: Ignite the fire within the Crimson Warriors' hearts in their final showdown!
70070000033943.name: Homura: The Crimson Warriors Deluxe Edition

70010000103641.description:
Solve the wacky point & click puzzles filled with horror and humor. Break the witch's curse on your home as you explore five distinct regions, each hiding a sacred key to unlock the village chest.

Features:
- Despite the bright graphics, this game is definitely not for children!
- Memorable characters with their own personality
- Ultra-high resolution artworks
- Unconventional humor
- Some evil creatures
70010000103641.intro: Solve the wacky point & click puzzles filled with horror and humor!
70010000103641.name: NubiaPhobia

70010000120286.description:
Travel through Time! In this cozy hidden-object adventure, cats and friends explore the contrast between a magical past and a high-tech future. Every detail invites you to discover that whether in a castle or a skyscraper, friendship and fun are timeless.

Start your journey in The Old Kingdom, a peaceful medieval citadel where everyday life unfolds with gentle humor. Watch clumsy trainees, wandering performers, and eccentric adventurers in a world inspired by classic RPGs, full of warm encounters and legendary charm.

Then, warp into The New Frontier to visit Neo-Cat Metropolis. Explore a bustling city of glass towers and floating platforms where robots get confused and flying cars break down. Amidst the neon lights, discover that friends helping friends is what truly keeps the future moving.

Features:

- Cats and Friends: Find delightful characters in two detailed scenes—one from a mythic past and one from a comic future.
- Balloon-Popping Fun: Enjoy relaxing gameplay as you pop balloons across the scenes—a bit of fun with every search!
- Rich Details: Explore beautifully illustrated settings that blend fantasy and sci-fi with visual storytelling in every corner.
- Over 600 Items to Find! Search for 202 cats, 202 unique characters, and colorful balloons hidden throughout the ages.
- Atmospheric Soundtrack: Set the tone with immersive music tailored to match each era—from cozy medieval tunes to chill futuristic beats.
- Family-Friendly Fun: With cozy, pressure-free gameplay and intuitive controls, it’s an experience for all ages. Perfect for relaxing together or playing solo.

Celebrate the connection between myth and machine in this heartwarming journey—where every moment is worth remembering.
70010000120286.intro: Join cute cats in a time-travel adventure! Find feline friends and pop balloons as you explore a magical medieval kingdom and a chaotic sci-fi metropolis.
70010000120286.name: Meow Moments: Celebrating Myth & Machine

70010000093949.description:
You are hired as a mini-golf level tester by the french company ROGOLF. Management will always expect big quality scores from your golfing skills... 
Thanks to the help of the Smuggler, cheat your way through the floors of this strange office building, or get fired trying to !
Bonuses you buy will grant you access to secret rooms, rule-breaking cards and make your score explode !
In need of a day off ? Try the "Team Building" multiplayer game mode, and play locally with up to 4 players.
70010000093949.intro: Play mini-golf, buy equipment and score enough points to reach the top. Each level has it’s own rules and each game is different.
70010000093949.name: ROGOLF

70010000115122.description:
■ MotionRec is a "recording puzzle action" game.

Use the ability to record your own movements and play them back elsewhere to explore a world of devastation.

You can record the trajectory of your movements, from walking to jumping. Use stage gimmicks to create and record more complex movements to traverse the world.

■ Record your movements and play them back in another location!

This will let you reach places too high to jump up to, or even access spots where there's nothing to stand on.

Make good use of the MotionRec ability to unravel the mysteries behind this devastated world ruled by machines!
70010000115122.intro: Use stage gimmicks to create and record more complex movements to traverse the world.
70010000115122.name: MotionRec

70010000117910.description: Move the Nintendo Switch™ to guide balls through handcrafted mazes.
70010000117910.intro: Move the Nintendo Switch™ to guide balls through handcrafted mazes.
70010000117910.name: Game With Balls

70010000118428.description:
By day, they are untouchable icons.
By night… they are men with secrets.

The city sees fearless superheroes: symbols of strength, protectors of justice, living legends.
But when the masks come off, you discover the truth hidden beneath power and perfection.

Desire.
Tension.
Control.
Vulnerability.

Dangerous Superheroes After Dark: Heroes Behind the Mask is a narrative-driven gay dating visual novel where your choices shape your relationship with powerful anime superheroes living double lives.

Each hero hides more than his identity.
Behind the public image lies pressure, expectation… and a connection he can’t risk.

You’re not just another civilian.

You’re the one man who sees him, not the symbol, but the person.

Will you break through his walls?
Will you protect his secret?
Or will passion blur the line between hero and something far more dangerous?


FEATURES:

● POWERFUL HERO CAST: Meet anime superheroes with unique abilities, strong personalities, and hidden weaknesses.

● SECRET IDENTITIES: Discover who they really are when the mask comes off.

● CHOICE-DRIVEN ROMANCE: Your decisions influence trust, intimacy, and destiny.

● MULTIPLE STORY ROUTES: Each hero has branching paths and exclusive scenes.

● DIFFERENT ENDINGS: Romance, betrayal, obsession, redemption… or heartbreak.

● HIGH REPLAY VALUE: Unlock new dialogue, hidden moments, and alternate outcomes.


He fights villains in the shadows.
Will you be the one he lets in… after dark?
70010000118428.intro:
When the city sleeps, their control begins to slip.
Behind every mask… there’s a man who could ruin you.
Will you earn his trust or surrender to the danger?
70010000118428.name: Dangerous Superheroes After Dark: Heroes Behind the Mask

70010000118453.description:
By day, they are symbols.

By night… they are something else.

The city worships them as fearless heroines: guardians of justice, icons of power, untouchable legends.
But when the lights fade and the masks come off, you discover a side no one else is allowed to see.

Strength. Doubt. Desire. Vulnerability.

Dangerous Superheroes After Dark: Heroines Behind the Mask is a narrative-driven dating visual novel where your choices shape your relationship with powerful anime superheroines hiding more than just their identities.

Each heroine carries a double life.
A public symbol of perfection… and a private world filled with secrets, pressure, and temptation.

You’re not just another civilian.

You’re the one person who sees the woman behind the legend.

Will you earn her trust?
Will you protect her secret?
